prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, listen up! You've got this. I know you've been putting this task off, but it's time to face it head-on. You're stronger than you think, and you've got the skills and determination to tackle this challenge. 

Remember, success is not about avoiding the hard stuff, it's about confronting it and coming out on top. So take a deep breath, square your shoulders, and dive in. You've got this! 

And hey, once you're done, you'll feel a sense of accomplishment that'll make all the effort worthwhile. So go ahead, give it your best shot. You're capable of more than you know. Now, let's get to work!
